name: Ham & Sour Cream Baked Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Butter a 3-quart casserole dish.
3. Combine the cooked noodles and remaining ingredients in a bowl, stirring until well mixed.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared casserole dish.
5. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes, or until bubbling and set.
